name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, delayed financial reporting causes missed client insights. We automate report generation and distribution instead of manual report generation and email distribution.

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, delayed financial reporting causes missed client insights. We automate report generation and distribution instead of manual report generation and email distribution.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual report generation and email distribution
